From: adm.clarke@ssc-spc.gc.ca
To: alice.tran@ssc-spc.gc.ca; carol.nguyen@ssc-spc.gc.ca; finance.review@ssc-spc.gc.ca
Subject: NGIS Phase 3 — Decision: Timeline and Budget Revision
Date: March 9, 2026

Project Team,

Following the steering committee session on March 8 and consultation
with Treasury Board Secretariat, I am writing to communicate an executive
decision regarding the NGIS Phase 3 project parameters.

DECISION 1 — TIMELINE EXTENSION:
The project completion date is hereby extended to Q4 2026 (December 31, 2026).
The original Q2 2026 (April 30, 2026) Go-Live target is no longer operative.
This extension accommodates the vendor delay, the ITSG-33 compliance
remediation, and the DR site assessment requested at the March 8 meeting.

DECISION 2 — BUDGET INCREASE:
The approved project budget is increased to $3,500,000 (three million
five hundred thousand dollars), effective immediately. This supersedes
the previously approved envelope of $2,400,000. The additional $1,100,000
covers: middleware remediation ($340,000), DR site assessment and
preliminary design ($400,000), extended contract costs due to timeline
extension ($260,000), and contingency reserve ($100,000).

Treasury Board notification will be submitted by the SSC Finance team.
A formal amendment to the project charter will be circulated for signature
by end of week.

Please update all project documentation, risk registers, and reporting
templates to reflect these revised parameters effective immediately.

ADM Clarke
Assistant Deputy Minister, Digital Services
Shared Services Canada
